description: Celestial Index — context routing for Magna Enso. Each area maps to the files/tests/docs a worker should load for that task. Workers load ONLY the relevant area (Route phase); full-repo scans are exceptional. In Sprint 1 most runtime areas are PLANNED (their files do not exist yet).

trace-governance.description: TRACE operating instance: config, onboarding, status, roles, workflows, templates, logs.

evidence-and-decisions.description: Decision log, feature tracker, risk register, validation checklist, evidence packages.

hermes-audit.description: Sprint 2 read-only Hermes audit NOTES only (in docs/audit/). The Hermes clone itself lives in a separate scratch workspace, never in this repo.

capability-governance.description: Capability-policy design (Polaris): taxonomy, policy schema, default-deny, approval gates.

runtime-baseline.description: Clean governed Hermes fork baseline runtime (provenance + SHA + license recorded).

policy-engine.description: Capability-policy engine: gating, approval-request flow, decision/evidence logging.

memory-skill-governance.description: Memory-write approval + change log; skill registry + activation gates.

lan-mobile-control.description: LAN-bound mobile control surface (off by default, no public exposure).

remote-instruction-package.description: Remote instruction package importer/validator (inert until human-approved).

execution-capture.description: Local execution capture + secret redaction (local-only, no off-machine telemetry).

capability-control-ui.description: Capability Control UI (the Observatory for Enso): approvals, schedules, evidence browser.

rules.do_not_load_planned_areas: Areas with status PLANNED have no files yet; do not fabricate them.
